subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to fetch top 5 publishers by spend in Q4 2024 (Oct-Dec 2024)

Reconcile publisher spend data with contract and renewal status to identify at-risk publishers (renewal timeline, spend trends, compliance issues) and generate SAM team summary with risk classification and recommendations

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks are minimal: (1) sql_gen (small tier) generates a straightforward Q4 spend ranking query—single-table aggregation with date filtering and TOP 5 is simple; (2) cross_recon (mid tier) takes the SQL results and reconciles them with contract/renewal metadata to assess risk factors (renewal dates, compliance, trends) and produce the SAM summary. Cross_recon is mid-tier because it requires reasoning across multiple signal types (spend, contract status, renewal timeline) to classify risk. The summary and recommendations are part of cross_recon output, not a separate downstream task.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5

sam_team_summary.note: MongoDB operational state data not provided; reconciliation based on SQL historical data only. Request renewal timeline and compliance audit data for complete risk assessment.
